title: Stale Artifact Cleanup
purpose: Remove or regenerate stale artifacts: projections, bootstrap files, deprecated policies, and orphaned generated files.
architectural_constraints: Deprecated policies marked with supersession notice
Projections regenerated from current runtime state
Bootstrap regenerated to reference current milestone/ticket

deliverables.description: Regenerated projections from current M25/T25.1 state

acceptance_criteria: All 4 projection files regenerated and reference current state
No artifacts reference M12/T11.4 or earlier obsolete states
Archive manifest lists all moved artifacts with reason

traceability.description: Regenerated bootstrap to M26/T26.6, regenerated 3 projections, archived continuation-policy.md and active-execution.md, created archive manifest with 17 archived artifacts.

failure_modes.scenario: Regenerating projections from current state produces incorrect data
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate projection content against runtime-state.json before replacing
